title: scrophularia formosana
intro: Scrophularia formosana, also known as Formosa figwort, is a species of flowering plant in the figwort family Scrophulariaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing swelling, and promoting wound healing. Scrophularia formosana is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
